events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Richard Starkey, known professionally as Ringo Starr, was born on this day in 1940.

angles.name: Drumming Legend
angles.copy: Eighty-six years young today! We're celebrating the one and only Ringo Starr, the legendary drummer who kept the beat for The Beatles. What's your favourite Ringo vocal track?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist, Brian May, was born on this day in 1947.

angles.name: Guitar God Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the absolute legend, Brian May! The Queen guitarist and astrophysicist continues to rock the world. What's your top Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: Sir Michael Philip Jagger, lead singer of The Rolling Stones, was born on this day in 1943.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Icon
angles.copy: Still got the moves at 83! Wishing a very happy birthday to the incomparable Mick Jagger. What's your favourite Rolling Stones track to get you dancing?

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) officially launched in the United States on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the first music video aired.

angles.name: The Day Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, MTV launched and changed music forever. The first video? The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. The irony isn't lost on us!

events.title: Oasis released Definitely Maybe (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994, becoming a cornerstone of the Britpop era.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: Twenty-two years ago, Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and unleashed a new era of British rock. What's your standout track from this Britpop masterpiece?

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place (1969)
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in counterculture history, took place over three days in August 1969.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since half a million gathered for three days of peace and music at Woodstock. A truly iconic moment in history. Which performance defined it for you?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, the 'King of Rock and Roll', passed away on this day in 1977; he would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering the one and only Elvis Presley, who left us on this day in 1977. His legacy as the King of Rock and Roll lives on. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Tupac Shakur, a hugely influential rapper, was fatally shot on this day in 1996; he would have been 55 this year.

angles.name: Remembering Tupac
angles.copy: On this day in 1996, we lost a true hip-hop legend, Tupac Shakur. His powerful lyrics and enduring influence continue to resonate. What's your most impactful Tupac song?

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Jimi Hendrix, widely regarded as one of the greatest guitarists of all time, passed away on this day in 1970; he would have been 84 this year.

angles.name: Guitar Hero Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled Jimi Hendrix, who we lost on this day in 1970. His revolutionary guitar work changed music forever. What's your favourite Hendrix riff?

events.title: The Beatles released Abbey Road (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles released their eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', on this day in 1969, featuring its iconic zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Iconic Album Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago today, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is as legendary as the music within. What's your favourite track from it?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, lead singer of The Pretenders, was born on this day in 1951.

angles.name: Pretenders Frontwoman
angles.copy: Seventy-five years strong! Wishing a very happy birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde, the powerhouse voice of The Pretenders. What's your go-to Pretenders hit?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: William John Paul Gallagher, best known as the frontman of Oasis, was born on this day in 1972.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! The Oasis legend still brings the rock 'n' roll swagger. What's your favourite Liam vocal?

events.title: John Lennon released Imagine (1975)
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic song 'Imagine' was released as a single in the US on this day in 1975, having been on his 1971 album.

angles.name: Imagine's Message
angles.copy: Forty-one years ago, John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single. Its message of peace and unity resonates as strongly as ever. What does this song mean to you?

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple introduced its first-generation iPod, revolutionising portable music players, on this day in 2001.

angles.name: Music in Your Pocket
angles.copy: Twenty-five years ago, Apple launched the original iPod, changing how we listen to music forever. Who else remembers their first click wheel?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: James Bond Day celebrates the release of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', on this day in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Sixty-four years since 'Dr. No' first hit screens. Which Bond film or theme song is your all-time favourite?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: John Winston Ono Lennon, co-founder of The Beatles, was born on this day in 1940.

angles.name: Remembering John Lennon
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire generations. What's your favourite Lennon lyric?
